docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,527.92 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO RESTORATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT FINLEY, JULIE C/O LANDELS, RIPLEY & DIAMOND FINLEY, ROBERT C/O LANDELS, RIPLEY & DIAMOND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
